articles.title: Authorities arrest special forces soldier who allegedly made $400K on Polymarket bet involving Maduro operation
articles.description: The soldier is accused of using classified government information to inform a wager on the prediction market Polymarket.
articles.author: Lucas Ropek

articles.title: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
articles.description: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup

articles.title: Instagram tests a new ‘Instants’ app for sharing disappearing photos
articles.description: The app lets users share disappearing photos with their friends that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
articles.description: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
articles.description: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.

articles.title: Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says

articles.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
articles.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

articles.title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
articles.description: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Bluesky now supports better-quality photos
articles.description: The max size is now 2MB and max resolution is 4000 x 4000.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Microsoft offers buyout for up to 7% of US employees
articles.description: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
articles.description: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants.

articles.title: X is shutting down Communities because of low usage and lots of spam
articles.description: X Communities are no more. Only a fraction of X users were using Communities, and much of that use was spam, the company said.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Salmon raises $100M in equity and debt to bring digital credit to underbanked Filipinos
articles.description: Salmon is targeting underbanked Filipinos, with little to no credit history, as well as people unhappy with the incumbent lenders' reliability issues.
articles.author: Kate Park

articles.title: Vercel says some of its customers’ data was stolen prior to its recent hack
articles.description: The app and website hosting company has found evidence of a second compromise of customer accounts after expanding its initial investigation
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
articles.description: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: Shade lands $14M to let creative teams search their video libraries in plain English
articles.description: Shade has its own filesystem that lets you "stream" files directly to your local drive
